news.headline: Sprott Physical Platinum and Palladium Trust expands equity program, adding sales agents to issue up to $50 million of Units in US and Canada.
news.summary: On December 6, 2024, Sprott Asset Management LP, a subsidiary of Sprott Inc., representing the Sprott Physical Platinum and Palladium Trust (NYSE: SPPP) (TSX: SPPP / SPPP.U), a closed-ended mutual fund trust focused on investing in physical platinum and palladium bullion, revealed the expansion of its at-the-market equity program. The program aims to issue up to US$50 million worth of units of the Trust ("Units") in both the United States and Canada.

news.headline: Sprott Physical Gold Trust expands equity program, adding sales agents to issue up to $1 billion Units in US & Canada.
news.summary: On December 6, 2024, Sprott Asset Management LP, a subsidiary of Sprott Inc., representing the Sprott Physical Gold Trust (NYSE: PHYS) (TSX: PHYS / PHYS.U), disclosed the inclusion of more sales agents to its at-the-market equity program. This move aims to allow the issuance of up to US$1 billion worth of Trust units in the United States and Canada. The Trust, a closed-ended mutual fund trust, was established to invest in and reserve most of its assets in physical gold bullion.

news.headline: Sprott Physical Silver Trust expands equity program with up to US$1 billion Units, adding sales agents.
news.summary: On December 6, 2024, Sprott Asset Management LP, a subsidiary of Sprott Inc., representing the Sprott Physical Silver Trust, disclosed the inclusion of more sales agents to its at-the-market equity program. The initiative aims to issue a total of up to US$1 billion worth of Units in the United States and Canada. The Trust, classified as a closed-ended mutual fund trust, was established for the purpose of investing predominantly in physical silver bullion. The Trust is listed on the NYSE under the symbol PSLV and on the TSX under both PSLV and PSLV.U.

news.headline: DOJ ends investigation on RealPage's rental housing pricing practices in the U.S. from Richardson, Texas.
news.summary: RealPage, based in Richardson, Texas, recently announced that the U.S. Department of Justice has concluded its investigation into the company's multifamily rental housing pricing practices. The investigation has been terminated, and RealPage has released a statement regarding this development. The exact details of the investigation and the reasons for its conclusion have not been disclosed. The news marks a significant development for the company, which operates in the competitive rental housing market. No specific numbers or figures were provided in the statement.

news.headline: Sprott Physical Gold and Silver Trust expands equity program, adding sales agents to issue up to US$250 million in Units.
news.summary: On December 6, 2024, Sprott Asset Management LP, a subsidiary of Sprott Inc., representing the Sprott Physical Gold and Silver Trust (NYSE: CEF) (TSX: CEF) (TSX: CEF.U), a mutual fund trust focused on investing in physical gold and silver bullion, revealed the inclusion of new sales agents in its at-the-market equity program. This move aims to issue a maximum of US$250 million worth of Trust Units in both the United States and Canada.

news.headline: Trump transition: RFK Jr. agrees to disclosures, ABC reports
Brigit reports increased spending by paycheck-to-paycheck consumers during Black Friday/Cyber Monday period, with US retail sales expected to hit $75 billion, a 5% increase from 2023.
news.summary: In New York, Brigit, a prominent financial wellness app, published its 2024 Black Friday and Cyber Monday expenditure analysis, indicating a rise in spending by paycheck-to-paycheck consumers compared to the previous year. Before the weekend, it was projected that US retail sales would hit an all-time high of $75 billion during the Black Friday and Cyber Monday weekend, showcasing a 5% increase in retail sales growth from the corresponding period in 2023.

news.headline: Trump says senators have not given assurances on Hegseth
Trump maintains confidence in Hegseth
Trump: NBC interview highlights
Teamsters at Pepsi refuse NDAs amid plant closure aftermath. Unanimous rejection of PepsiCo's demand.
news.summary: Following the illegal closure of a plant in Chicago, on December 6, 2024, PepsiCo Beverages North America has made further demands on Teamsters Local 727. The company requested that members and officers sign non-disclosure agreements (NDAs) as a prerequisite. The request has been unanimously rejected by the team, highlighting their resistance towards the company's actions. This development comes amidst the aftermath of the plant closure, with tensions escalating due to the unreasonable demands being made.

news.headline: Apollo Global Management and Workday to join S&P 500; Dec 23, 2024. Changes for S&P MidCap 400 and S&P SmallCap 600 indices.
news.summary: On December 6, 2024, S&P Dow Jones Indices announced upcoming adjustments to the S&P 500, S&P MidCap 400, and S&P SmallCap 600 indices. These changes will be implemented before the start of trading on Monday, December 23, aligning with the quarterly rebalance. The modifications aim to optimize the performance of the indices and will affect numerous companies included in them.

news.headline: Lisa Vanderpump throws grand opening party for Pinky’s at Flamingo Las Vegas with actors, reality stars, and cast from new show.
news.summary: In Las Vegas, guests were delighted at the grand opening of Lisa Vanderpump's latest eatery and bar, Pinky's by Vanderpump, at Flamingo Las Vegas. The event saw the attendance of various celebrities, including actors Jesse Bradford and Andrea Watrouse, reality TV personalities Tom Schwartz and Peter Madrigal, and the cast of Vanderpump's newest program, "Vanderpump Villa." Named after Vanderpump's moniker, "Pinky," the venue promises a unique dining and cocktail experience for customers.

news.headline: Mustang Energy Corp. achieves initial agreement milestone with Skyharbour Resources Ltd. #energy #mining
news.summary: In a recent development, it has been reported that the unemployment rate in the country has fallen to a record low of 3.5%. The number of new jobs created last month reached an impressive 250,000, exceeding economists' expectations. This positive trend has resulted in a total of 4.3 million jobs added to the economy so far this year. Additionally, the average hourly earnings for workers saw a rise of 3.1% from the previous year, indicating a potential boost in consumer spending. Overall, these figures suggest a strong and growing economy with promising prospects for the future.

news.headline: Nasdaq nears 20,000; caution as tech shares surge. Investors eye buy signals from four tech giants per Investor's Business Daily.
news.summary: The Nasdaq index is approaching the significant milestone of 20,000, indicating potential growth, although caution is advised as it may be overextended. Notably, four prominent technology companies are showing signs of being favorable for investment. This update on Dow Jones Futures highlights the nearing milestone for Nasdaq from a recent article on Investor's Business Daily.

news.headline: Voxtur amends financial statements for Q3 2024; discloses non-compliance with financial covenants as of Sept 30, 2024.
news.summary: Voxtur Analytics Corp announced amendments to its Unaudited Condensed Interim Consolidated Financial Statements and related Management's Discussion and Analysis for the three and nine months ended September 30, 2024. The amendments include the removal of a sentence regarding financial covenant compliance with credit facilities as of September 30, 2024. The amended documents have been filed on SEDAR. The article was published on December 6, 2024.

news.headline: Voxtur amends Q3 financial statements, MD&A; filed on SEDAR+; discrepancies found post Nov 28 filing.
news.summary: Voxtur Analytics Corp, a technology company based in Toronto and Tampa, made an announcement on December 6, 2024. The company, listed on TSXV as VXTR and OTCQB as VXTRF, is focused on creating a more transparent real estate lending ecosystem in North America. Following a filing on November 28, 2024, Voxtur identified certain disclosures that necessitate amendments to its Unaudited Condensed Interim Consolidated Financial Statements and Management’s Discussion and Analysis for the three and nine months ending on September 30, 2024. In response, the company confirmed that revised Financial Statements and MD&A have been submitted on SEDAR.

news.headline: Gensource Potash Corp granted 11.95M stock options to directors and officers at $0.065/share, valid for 5 years.
news.summary: In Saskatchewan, Gensource Potash Corporation has granted a total of 11,950,000 stock options to specific directors and senior officers. These options, which have an exercise price of $0.065 per share, can be exercised over a 5-year period. The stock options were issued under the Company’s stock option plan.

news.headline: Giarmarco, Mullins & Horton, P.C. wins Michigan Top Workplaces 2024 award, based on employee feedback survey.
news.summary: In Troy, Michigan on December 6, 2024, Giarmarco, Mullins & Horton, P.C. received the prestigious Top Workplaces 2024 award from The Michigan Top Workplaces. This honor was achieved through an employee feedback survey conducted by a third-party that highlighted the positive workplace environment.

news.headline: Shares of Apollo Global Management and Workday surge as they prepare to be added to the S&P 500 index.
Apollo Global Management and Workday shares surge, gaining 7% and 5% respectively. #stocks #marketmovement
Senator Ernst: Post on X includes comments about Hegseth
Ernst Believes Hegseth Should Have Chance to Speak at Fair Hearing
Senator Ernst to meet with Hegseth again next week
U.S. Gold Corp. closes $10.2M direct offering with 1,457,700 shares of common stock sold at $7 per share.
news.summary: In Cheyenne, Wyoming, on December 6, 2024, U.S. Gold Corp. successfully completed the sale of 1,457,700 shares of its common stock at a rate of $7.00 per share. This transaction marks a significant milestone for the company and demonstrates strong investor interest in the business.

news.headline: TomaGold plans to do a private placement of up to 20M FT Shares at $0.025/share & 25M Common Shares at $0.02/share.
news.summary: TomaGold Corporation (TSXV: LOT) in Montreal has revealed plans to undergo a non-brokered private placement, pending approval from the TSX Venture Exchange. The company aims to issue up to 20 million common shares at $0.025 per FT Share and up to 25 million common shares at $0.02 per share. The aggregate value of the private placement is significant, reaching a total of $950,000 for the FT Shares and $500,000 for the Common Shares.

news.headline: Golden Minerals faces delisting from NYSE American, plans transition to OTCQB market.
news.summary: Golden Minerals Company, listed as AUMN on NYSE-A and TSX, has been notified by NYSE American LLC about the commencement of proceedings to suspend and delist its common stock due to non-compliance with Sections 1003(a)(i) and 1003(a)(ii), after the Exchange found the company unsuitable for listing. This decision impacts the future trading status of the company's stock.

news.headline: Brazil's currency hits record low against USD as official fails to calm investor concerns.
news.summary: A new report indicates that the global economy is expected to grow by 5.6% in 2021, which is an increase from the 3.5% growth seen in 2020. The recovery is being driven by a rise in vaccinations and fiscal support from governments. However, the report warns that there is a high degree of uncertainty surrounding these projections, with risks stemming from the uneven distribution of vaccines and the potential for new COVID-19 variants. Emerging markets and developing economies are forecasted to grow by 6.3% this year, while advanced economies are expected to see 5.4% growth. In comparison, the global economy contracted by 3.5% in 2020, marking the worst peacetime recession since the Great Depression. Despite the positive outlook for 2021, analysts caution that the recovery remains fragile and dependent on various factors that could impact growth.

news.headline: Global tote bags market to grow by $9.19B (2024-2028) due to luxury bag personalization and AI influence - Technavio.
news.summary: In recent findings from a report utilizing AI technology, it has been projected that the global market for tote bags is set to increase by a substantial USD 9.19 billion between the years 2024 and 2028. The analysis conducted by Technavio indicates an anticipated Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 6.78% over the forecast period, reflecting significant growth prospects in this market segment.

news.headline: S&P and Nasdaq hit all-time highs. Closing bell brings record numbers.
Global custom apparel market to grow by USD 2.17 Billion (8.04% CAGR) from 2024-2028 due to internet and smartphone adoption.
news.summary: A recent report explores the impact of AI on market evolution, revealing that the global custom apparel market is projected to increase by USD 2.17 billion between 2024 and 2028. Research by Technavio indicates that the market is expected to expand at a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 8.04% throughout the forecast period.

news.headline: Brazilian court upholds decision for Tenaris to pay indemnification in Usiminas acquisition; subject to further appeals.
news.summary: Luxembourg-based Tenaris S.A. disclosed on December 6, 2024, that the Brazilian Superior Court of Justice (SCJ) has dismissed a motion of clarification by its subsidiary Confab, alongside Ternium's subsidiaries Ternium Investments and Ternium Argentina (all part of the T/T Group under the Usiminas shareholders agreement). The SCJ's unanimous decision upheld its ruling from June 18, 2024, which mandated the T/T Group to pay an indemnification to Companhia Siderúrgica Nacional (CSN) concerning their 2012 acquisition of a stake in Usiminas. This development marks a significant legal outcome for Tenaris and its subsidiaries, who were contesting the SCJ decision aimed at resolving the financial matter with CSN.

news.headline: U.S. court denies request to lift new law; TikTok must be sold by Jan. 19 to avoid ban in U.S.Owned by ByteDance.
news.summary: By January 19, if ByteDance, the owner of the video app, does not sell it to a non-Chinese company, the law will enforce a ban on the app in the United States.

news.headline: Former ASML worker accused of stealing proprietary information, as reported by NOS; no specific figures released.
Athira Pharma presents preclinical data on ATH-1105's neuroprotective effects at ALS/MND symposium. Dec. 6-8, 2024 in Montreal. $ATHA.
news.summary: Bothell, Washington, December 6, 2024 - Today, Athira Pharma, Inc. (NASDAQ: ATHA), a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company specializing in the development of small molecules to improve neuronal health and combat neurodegeneration, unveiled preclinical findings showcasing the efficacy of ATH-1105 in engaging targets and protecting human motor neurons. The data was presented at the Motor Neurone Disease Association’s 35th International Symposium on ALS/MND held from December 6-8, 2024, in Montreal, Canada.

news.headline: BILL has closed its offering of $1.4 billion 0% Convertible Senior Notes due 2030, with an additional $150.0 million from initial purchasers.
news.summary: SAN JOSE, Calif.--BILL Holdings, Inc. disclosed the recent closure of its offering of 0% Convertible Senior Notes due 2030, listed as (NYSE: BILL), securing total proceeds of $1.4 billion. This sum incorporates the complete exercise of the $150.0 million option extended by BILL to the original Note purchasers. The issuance of the Notes took place through a private placement to individuals deemed qualified institutional buyers under Rule 144A under the Securities Act.

news.headline: Syntheia Corp. begins SOC 2 Type I certification, reinforcing data privacy commitment. #AIassistant #security #privacy.
news.summary: In Toronto, Syntheia Corp., a top provider of conversational AI solutions for inbound call management, has started the SOC 2 Type I certification process, demonstrating its dedication to protecting customer data and ensuring top-notch security and privacy standards. The company, listed as CSE – SYAI, aims to uphold the highest levels of security as verified through this certification. The process kickstarted on October 18 as part of Syntheia’s ongoing efforts to strengthen its services.

news.headline: Potential impact of a 2nd Trump term on trade: Europe's largest deal with South America may signal trend in diversifying trade alliances amidst tariff threats.
news.summary: The recent pact between Europe and South America marks the largest deal to date, signifying a shift in trade relationships amid uncertain tariff threats. This agreement reflects a growing trend towards diversification in trade alliances, with the pact poised to impact various sectors. The deal's significance is emphasized by the substantial numbers involved, indicating a potential reconfiguration of global trade dynamics in response to geopolitical uncertainties.

news.headline: Tandy Leather Factory to sell headquarters facilities for $26.5 million to Colonna Brothers, Inc. Expected to close in Jan 2025.
news.summary: Tandy Leather Factory, Inc. disclosed the signing of a Purchase and Sale Agreement to transfer its corporate headquarters facilities, encompassing the primary distribution center and flagship retail store, to Colonna Brothers, Inc. The deal is priced at $26.5 million, exclusive of taxes and expenses, and is slated to finalize in January 2025. Following the conclusion of the sale, the Company plans to engage in lease agreements to continue operating in its current locations until around September 2025, as it locates and readies new facilities within the Fort Worth, Texas region.

news.headline: Analyst predicts Ethereum will reach $15,000 by May 2025 after breaking $4K resistance level.
news.summary: The value of Ethereum has successfully surpassed the $4,000 barrier, with one market expert predicting a potential rise to $15,000 by May of 2025.

news.headline: Building automation market to grow by USD 31.12 Billion from 2024-2028 due to demand for energy efficiency and AI - Technavio.
news.summary: A recent report highlights the significant impact of artificial intelligence on market evolution. Over the period 2024-2028, the global market size for building automation and control systems is projected to increase by approximately $31.12 billion, as indicated by Technavio. The market is expected to register a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 8.71%, showcasing the considerable transformation driven by AI in this sector.

news.headline: Zuckerberg states Meta's AI chatbot has almost 600M monthly users.
news.summary: Mark Zuckerberg revealed that Meta.ai has close to 600 million active users per month. The announcement was made regarding the growing popularity of Meta's AI Chatbot, as Zuckerberg shared the milestone during a recent event. It showcases the significant reach and engagement of the platform, which has garnered substantial traction among users.

news.headline: SoundHound stock gained 61% after deal with Torchy's Tacos. Nvidia-backed company's rally poses risks.
news.summary: After securing a partnership with Torchy's Tacos, SoundHound experienced a notable increase in stock value on Thursday and Friday. The Nvidia-backed company witnessed a significant 61% weekly gain following the deal. This surge in stock value highlights the potential benefits of the collaboration with Torchy's Tacos. However, analysts caution that the substantial rally also carries inherent risks for investors.

news.headline: Bitcoin's rising trend prompts interest, consult AI for guidance on potential gains.
UnitedHealth Group faces worst week since Covid shutdown after top executive's murder in midtown Manhattan.
news.summary: The managed care industry, including UnitedHealth Group, is facing turmoil following the tragic killing of a senior executive in midtown Manhattan. UnitedHealth Group experienced its most challenging week since the Covid shutdown as a result of this incident. This news comes from Investor's Business Daily.

news.headline: Illinois American Water approved for new rates by ICC due to $557 million capital investments in 2024 and 2025. Rate change request filed on Jan 25, 2024.
news.summary: In Belleville, Illinois, the Illinois Commerce Commission (ICC) has approved new water and wastewater base rates for Illinois American Water. The rate increase is primarily due to $557 million in capital investments planned for 2024 and 2025. The request for the rate change was submitted on January 25, 2024. Illinois American Water aims to ensure the safety and reliability of their water and wastewater systems through continued essential investments.

news.headline: NASA awards contract to Nova Space Solutions to provide services for Stennis Space Center & Michoud Assembly Facility.
news.summary: In its latest announcement on December 6, 2024, NASA disclosed its choice of Nova Space Solutions, LLC based in Anchorage, Alaska, to oversee operations, services, maintenance, and infrastructure support for two key NASA facilities. These facilities include the Stennis Space Center situated near Bay St. Louis, Mississippi, and the Michoud Assembly Facility. This contract with Nova Space Solutions signifies a significant step for NASA in maintaining and enhancing the functionality of these crucial space centers.

news.headline: Anduril and Palantir to collaborate on AI for national security, aiming to advance US government's AI capabilities.
news.summary: In Denver, Palantir and Anduril, prominent companies in the realm of commercial technology and national security, have unveiled a fresh consortium with aims to propel the U.S. government to the forefront of artificial intelligence globally. The initiative seeks to provide the necessary technological framework, spanning from the edge to enterprise, to empower government and industry collaborators in harnessing America’s top-notch AI progress for the development of cutting-edge military and national security capabilities.

news.headline: Enanta Pharmaceuticals will present results from a Phase 2 study on zelicapavir for RSV in children aged 28 days to 36 months. Conference on December 9 at 8:30 am ET.
news.summary: Enanta Pharmaceuticals, Inc., a biotechnology company trading on NASDAQ as ENTA, disclosed plans to host a conference call and webcast on December 9th at 8:30 a.m. ET. The purpose is to reveal topline findings from RSVPEDs, a Phase 2 study investigating zelicapavir in children aged 28 days to 36 months with respiratory syncytial virus. This study marks a pioneering effort in pediatrics for the company.

news.headline: Automation Personnel Services' Atlanta branch in Mableton wins two awards in 2024, including Best Staffing Agency in Atlanta for 2nd year.
news.summary: Three branches of Automation Personnel Services were recently recognized as Best Staffing Agencies in their markets. The Atlanta Branch, based in Mableton, garnered two awards in 2024. This includes winning Best Staffing Agency in Atlanta's Best 2024 contest, organized by Atlanta Magazine, for the second year in a row. Furthermore, the Atlanta Branch also received recognition as the Best Employment Agency in the Best of Mableton. These achievements signify the excellence of Automation Personnel Services in the industry.
